metadata.description: Cross-P&ID super graph for POC P&IDs 006, 007, 008

connectivity_summary.process_flow_description: These three P&IDs cover a pipeline receiving and scraper/slug catcher system originating at DS-3. PID-006 handles the inlet section including a pressure control station and slug catcher vessel (361-V003), feeding into PID-007 which processes the scraper receiver outlet through a knock-out drum (361-V004) and routes condensate and gas onward. PID-007 connects downstream to PID-008, which consolidates fuel gas streams from multiple scraper receivers (DS-1 and DS-3) into vessel 512-V001 for treatment, with condensate routed to storage.

key_connections.description: Condensate from the DS-3 scraper receiver knock-out drum (361-V004) in PID-007 is routed to the Condensate Storage Vessel, which is received in PID-008 alongside streams from DS-1.

isolated_terminators: pid-006: FUEL GAS N-PG-PP01-PR-PID-0049 (references PID-0049, not present in this set)
pid-006: FROM DS-3 NEW PCV STATION N-PG-PP01-PR-PID-0003 (references PID-0003, not present in this set)
pid-006: TO SAFE LOCATION (external/utility destination, no matching P&ID)
pid-006: TO CORROSION INHIBITOR INJECTION PUMP (external skid, no matching P&ID)
pid-006: 2"-IA-DS03-20-0800-S01N1B / FROM DS-3 STATION DISTRIBUTION HEADER (instrument air source, no matching P&ID)
pid-006: DS-3 NEW KOD AREA (area reference, no matching P&ID)
pid-006: TO LAUNCHER AND CI SKID AREA (external skid, no matching P&ID)
pid-006: TO SCRAPER RECEIVER (DS-3) (likely connects to PID-007 but no explicit inter-P&ID connection recorded)
pid-006: TO DS-3 CLOSED DRAIN SYSTEM (external system, no matching P&ID)
pid-006: Main pipeline continues downward (continuation ref, no matching P&ID)
pid-007: TO FUEL GAS KNOCK OUT DRUM (external destination, no matching P&ID in this set)
pid-007: TO FLARE HEADER (x2) (utility destination, no matching P&ID)
pid-007: FROM SCRAPER LAUNCHER (DS-3) V003 (likely originates from PID-006 but no explicit inter-P&ID connection recorded)
pid-007: TO UNDERGROUND OILY WATER COLLECTION SYSTEM BY CIVIL (civil/external system, no matching P&ID)
pid-007: OSBL EPP FACILITY (outside battery limits, no matching P&ID)
pid-007: 20"-PP01-361-G... (continues right) (continuation ref, no matching P&ID)
pid-008: FUEL GAS FROM DS-1 SCRAPPER RECEIVER (DS-1 source, no matching P&ID in this set)
pid-008: FUEL GAS FROM DS-3 SCRAPPER RECEIVER (DS-3 source, likely from PID-006/007 but no explicit inter-P&ID connection recorded)
